MINI MINUTES: This cause came on regularly as scheduled for Minor's Compromise hearing this day.
Dept. 218, Judge Ollie Marie Victoire, Clerk: Cynthia Herbert, CSR: Cristina Paxton.
Atty. Paul Villancourt, of Brayton & Purcell Esq. for Petitioner: David Kahele as Guardian at litem for: Kylee Kahele, Shellee Kahele and Bradley Kahele, all minor Claimants. On the basis of evidence received, the Petition is granted and compromise is approved as follows: Settlement $630.00. Atty's fee- $136.32. Medical -$84.73 and Cost $221.05
A net balance of $408.95 to be deposited into a blocked account with Bank of Hawaii, located at 98211 Pali Momi St, Aiea HI for each three minors. The court additionaly ordered that future settlement from defendants may be recommended by counsel and may be accepted by petitioner and that 3% of cost incurred and atty. fees of 25%(execept as may be limited pursuant to Bankruptcy court proceeding) are deducted, shall be distributed pursuant to this court order without the further necessity of petition being made to this court. No withdrawals shall be made without a written court order or until the minor reaches the age of 18 years. (3) Order Approving Compromise of Claim and (3) Order to Deposit Money Into Blocked signed in open court.
